title: Overlabels Recipe Manifest
description: Declarative description of a Recipe: the primitives it wires together (option sets, pickers), the controls it exports, and the triggers that fire its pickers. Manifests are 100% declarative - no executable code - because they are intended to be Claude-auditable before publishing.

recipe_format_version.description: The schema version this manifest targets. The installer rejects formats it does not understand.

slug.description: Globally unique identifier for the recipe. Becomes part of [[[c:<slug>:<instance>:<name>]]] tag namespace; snake_case only.

version.description: Integer version. A new version is a new installable artifact, never an in-place upgrade.

description.description: Short blurb shown on the recipe's install page.

icon_url.description: URL to an icon image (PNG/JPG/WebP). Optional.

changelog.description: Notes on what changed in this version.

min_overlabels_version.description: Minimum platform schema version this manifest needs. Increments only on breaking changes to the recipe-format itself.

requires_integrations.description: List of external integration source keys this recipe reads controls from (e.g. ['kofi', 'streamlabs']). Installer warns but does not block when an installer lacks one of these.

max_instances_per_user.description: Per-user install cap for this recipe. Defaults to platform-wide admin setting if omitted.

option_sets.description: Named, reusable lists of values that pickers draw from.

pickers.description: RNG / selection engines over an option set.

control_exports.description: Maps picker state to user-facing controls. Each export becomes a [[[c:<slug>:<instance>:<name>]]] tag at install time.

expression_controls.description: Optional. Materialises one or more derived controls computed by the overlay's expression engine on every animation frame. Use these for animations (e.g. a wheel rotation that interpolates from 0 to the landing angle). The expression string uses the dot-notation control syntax (c.<recipe>.<instance>.<key>) and may reference now_ms() to become time-dependent. Inside the expression text, the literal __INSTANCE__ is substituted with the actually-installed instance slug at install time.

triggers.description: Entry points that fire pickers (chat command, dashboard button). EventSub and scheduled triggers are deliberately out of v1.

primitiveRef.description: Manifest-local identifier for a primitive. Translated to a real DB id and per-instance slug at install time.

controlExportName.description: Name of an exported control. Lands as the third colon segment in the tag namespace.

items.description: Default items. Each item is a short string. User-editable option sets accept post-install edits within min/max bounds.

option_set_ref.description: Must match the ref of an option_set declared in the same manifest.

from.description: Dotted path to the picker state being exported. Supported fields: result (string), result_index (integer position in the option set, useful for animation), result_at (Unix seconds), running (boolean).

expression.description: Single-expression formula evaluated by the overlay's expression engine. Reference other controls via the dot-notation form (c.<recipe>.<instance>.<key>) - the bracketed [[[c:...]]] form is for overlay HTML only. Use __INSTANCE__ wherever the installer should substitute the instance slug.

fires.description: Dotted path to the picker that fires. Format: pickers.<ref>.
